mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (room_id, sender_id, message_text, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageText}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET last_message_id = #{messageId}, last_message_text = #{messageText}, last_message_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, u.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.message_text, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT CASE WHEN user_a_id = #{senderId} THEN user_b_id ELSE user_a_id END FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
